reviews.review_title: THIS GAME IS HORRIBLE LOOK AT END
reviews.review_description:
The game is good other than bugs obv but why did almost my entire boat break? also, when I got the miner for the gravitonium a bug on my hand mAde it end up falling into the ocean and then when I get to the end, I realize that you need gravitonium to get through please make something to tell people that they need that and where to place it down, cause I didn’t know where to place it down, but why does it take four hours? That’s crazy long as well as my entire boat broke and I have no idea why the only thing I can think of is I claimed all my achievements cause I didn’t know about them and I got thousands of materials over half my boat break and I lost about
 3000 materials worth of stuff. Please answer and respond to this.

:edit: OK NOW I'M REALLY PISSED OFF WTF WHY DID I GO INTO SAVE 1 AND GO INTO CREATIVE WHEN MY PEACEFULL SAVE WAS IN MY AUTO SAVE AND THE CREATIVE SAVE GT RID OF MY PEACEFUL SLOT WHEN I WAS AT THE END WTF BRO THIS GAME SUCKS DON'T DOWNLOAD IT, ALSO I HAD THE GRAVITONIUM READY AT ANOTHER ISLAND AND IT GOT RID OF IT ETHER FIX THIS OR I'M NEVER PLAYING YOUR GAME AGAIN

Response to developer response: I uninstalled the game because I was mad and it got rid of everything anyway so I won't be playing the game again till its out if early acces so bye

developer_response.body:
Hi there — we’re really sorry for the frustration you’ve had.
We’ve logged the issues you reported (boat parts breaking after mass-claim, Gravitonium miner falling/unclear placement, long finale pacing, save slot overwritten when switching modes).

Fix progress is ongoing but slower than we’d like due to various constraints; we can’t promise a date yet.

Check your Autosave list to see if an earlier Peaceful run is still available; load the latest timestamp before switching modes.

reviews.review_description:
The game looked interesting when I bought it, but then as soon as I started playing it, I realize that the boat didn’t move   

The developers, please release an update about how the boats can move or fix it ￼￼

developer_response.body:
Thanks for taking the time to let us know about the issue with the boats not moving. We’re sorry this bug spoiled your first impression!

We’ve already released a hot-fix that resolves the problem for most players. To make sure the patch is applied cleanly, please try one of the following:

Start a new save file – this refreshes all mission scripts and usually clears the boat-movement bug.

Reinstall the game – uninstall, then download the latest build from your library. This guarantees every file is updated.

reviews.review_description: I love this game. Now playing my second run through. Had to get help from hubby on figuring out some of the steps on the islands. Challenging but not too challenging.

If you want a Raft VR, this works. its just soooo janky and some controls are un intuitive with placement. not to mention glitches bein a pain and tools that hit the water dont sink, theyre deleted. if you drop a large building due to a glitch its likely to fly to narnia and result in wasted materials. for its sales price is fair, i wouldnt buy it at full price personally

After playing this for a few hours I was disappointed, and somewhat surprised,  to find the movement issue still hasn't been resolved and it ruins the game.  No matter how I angled the sail, either with the wind or against it, I just wouldn't move.  In exasperation I even wasted time collecting resources for an engine and even that wouldn't budge me.  A massive flaw which is a shame because it would otherwise be good.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your feedback. We're sorry to hear you're experiencing movement issues in the game. We understand how frustrating that can be, and we'd love to help you resolve it. Have you tried the latest version? As far as we know, we have already fixed this issue in the recent update. Please feel free to join our Discord channel discord.gg/KTjpGAFuGE, where our support team is available to assist you with troubleshooting. We appreciate your patience and hope to get you back on track soon!

reviews.review_description:
The is game is perfect. The graphics are amazing and controls are smooth. You feel like a real space explorer on a thrilling adventure.

But there’s one big problem. Out of nowhere, your ship can suddenly break into pieces, even if you haven’t taken any damage also I am on peaceful mode. This glitch can ruin your progress and make the game frustrating.￼

If the developers fix this issue I will be appreciate it ,it would be a truly fantastic game!￼

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We're glad to hear you’re enjoying the graphics and controls in our game. 🌟

As for the issue with the ship splitting, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience. This is a rare glitch that we’ve been trying to resolve for some time, but unfortunately, we haven’t been able to find a perfect fix yet. In the meantime, we strongly recommend saving your progress frequently. We’ve also added an auto-save feature in the game settings to help minimize the impact of this issue. If your ship does split, reloading your latest save should resolve it immediately.

Additionally, we’d love for you to join our Discord channel to share feedback and connect with other players. Your insights are invaluable to us as we continue improving the game!
http://discord.gg/KTjpGAFuGE
Thank you for your support and understanding! 🚀

reviews.review_description: When is multiplayer coming out I have been waiting for ages please reply

developer_response.body: Thanks for reaching out! We just released a huge update with tons of new content, and the multiplayer version is currently in testing. We’re working hard to get it ready for everyone as soon as possible—stay tuned!

I've been playing this game from its very early early early stages. It has come a long way! 

This is a great game for those who want to relax and build / survive and explore. 

Or even for those who want to do all of that with a challenge.
Great game but just needs multiplayer and some bug fixes. things disappear and sometimes I can’t pick stuff up
How do you get the mining machine to work? It has 6 slots but nothing appears in them. Love the game but I can't proceed any farther in the game.

developer_response.body:
The mining machine in Floating World automatically extracts Gravitonium shards without fuel. Simply place the mining machine on top of the blue Gravitonium ore deposits found on various floating islands. Once positioned correctly, the machine will automatically begin mining Gravitonium over time.  
As a player, you just need to periodically return to collect the Gravitonium shards produced. These rare resources called "Gravitonium" can be used to upgrade devices using the upgrader station.

developer_response.body: We understand the player's expectations for a multiplayer mode, but as a small team, it is difficult to deliver a stable multiplayer experience at this time. To avoid disappointment among players, we have temporarily removed the multiplayer button, and we hope that the player can understand that we take every comment and review seriously. As a small team, it takes a lot of work to make a multiplayer game and we are trying our best to make it happen. We appreciate your support and understanding.

apart from that, i also have a problem with how to climb on the islands i guess, i get a bit anxious on the water, cuz it feels very deep- so when i get on an island i have a hard time climbing on top, and i just get suck under, i would love a tip to help me with that, cuz idk if it's a problem.. but in my opinion, it would be great if you could just put some- sand, like going under water to use for a plataform..

And what kind of game uses trigger to grab stuff instead of grip, it's literally called the GRIP BUTTON anyways don't waste your time trying this beta, I understand it's a beta but at least have a functional game before you release it to the public

reviews.review_title: A good mimic of Raft, in VR and Free
reviews.review_description: As you can see from the title, this is just like raft, but in VR. Due to it being developed in Chinese and then translated to English, there are a few mistranslations, but overall it is excellent. Since I've been playing for a while, (making it to about day 45 so far), I'd like to share some tips for newer players. At the start, you will have 6 raft floors, a grappling hook for grabbing trash, and a station used to recycle trash and create new objects, using these items, you expand and find floating items for materials. You generally want to recycle everything, but the 'delivery boxes'. These boxes contain many helpful things, such as seeds, materials, and, albeit rarely, blueprints. You mainly want the blueprints, but you also want to save the seeds for later, you can recycle the materials later. Work on expanding your area with the materials you have, and add nets to collect items when you are busy expanding, these nets are really good, and you will need them, especially during the late game when you are busy working on a lot of other projects. Pro Tip: When grabbing objects from the sea, after you have grabbed them and pulled them in with your grappling hook, press a/x to quickly put them in your backpack, when you have collected enough, you can then use the grip to pull out the whole stack, and put in a mass amount of the same item at once, which saves you a bunch of time. This can also work with breaking the boxes, to get every item out at once.

developer_response.body: Wow, thank you for liking this game. Your review will definitely help many new players.

reviews.review_description: if you like raft you would like this because it's raft but in vr

First the bad

This game is in alpha so I expect it not to be super polished but some of the controls are different than most games like holding items you use the trigger instead of the grip, not a big deal but different then most games, swimming is difficult, getting back on you boat is a pain when you fall in the water, you can place items like the sail off your boat and it is difficult to remove them.  Colors like grey are hard to get.

Next the good, it is really fun the creative mode had my lost in it for a good hour designing a boat house for my survival world.  The items are expensive but not too expensive, you could make rock easier though.  All the boat controls make sense and don’t act different then they would in real life.

Some suggestions it have.

Make it so you can copy and paste colors ( I did notice that when I point at something I colored it show what color but I am not sure what it does)

Make the anchor platform solid and picking the sail and stuff like the easier.  Add more story and bigger/more islands

Make getting on the boat easier and teleporting too

Overall great game and I look forward to its future

so many bugs and glitches in this game that need fixing, but its in alpha what do you expect? 
one thing that im unsure that got past the dev is the spelling mistakes, there are SO MANY spelling mistakes in this game.

hopefully this game will be updated and fixed!

I had a great time with the game and definitely reccomend this to anyone wanting to play a raft style game but my one question is how do I play with my friends?

Amazing game love it amazing game it's well as you can see by the title picture it is a mimic of raft as the first review says and I hope a lot of people get to know this game because it's amazing I've only played it for like 10 minutes 10 to 15 minutes so far and I love it already I'm just in love with it it's amazing I love the graphics I love the storyline so far I haven't gotten that far but I love everything about it cuz I don't have a computer or anything to play raft on so I love how I can play it in VR which is my favorite game console except developers you need to write this down I'm using an Oculus quest 2 and for some reason I don't know if it's like just a bug on my VR or something but it won't let me save I don't know if that's just me or if it's happening to other people but it won't let me be safe creators of the game if you could fix this or if you can't I don't care if you can't but it would be amazing if you could cuz I really want to see how far I can get in the storyline but I can't really do that when my Oculus dies and when I get back on and all my progress is gone and I have to restart so don't know if it's just my Oculus or if it's happening with other people but yeah fix your game all in all I give it a 10 out of 10 would recommend I'm going to play it again tomorrow if I can but yeah amazing game five stars for sure no doubt

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your review, the developers have been carefully watching each review
Our sincere apology!
we promise it will be fixed in next update. 

Before that, there are two methods you may try to deal with it:

Method 1: After the first launch of the game, when you see menu with “Start”, get back all the way along until you exit the game and launch it again.

Method 2: Be back at quest home, open Settings -  Apps  -  (Floating world - Alpha) - Storage, turn it off and turn it back on.

We hope all players can notice this report here, and proceed method above before you begin your journey, to make sure you can save your progress without any surprise.

reviews.review_title: Do NOT waste your money on this...
reviews.review_description:
The game is a mess, a buggy mess.


Want to grab objects? Gotta try at least 5 times.

Want resources? Too bad. The tiny resource Stream is always miles away from your boat.

Wanna MOVE? Nope. Not happening unless you restart the game every 5 minutes.

Wanna build a big boat? Well too bad because 50 Blocks is the maximum building limit.


I streamed this game for a couple of hours on my channel (BamirengVR) you can have a look for yourself how I am struggling to do the absolute basics in this game...

This game doesn't need more content or Features it needs polish. And judging by how slow the development is (assuming it's 1 guy) it needs at least 1 year of dedicated bug and mechanical polishing.

I would LOVE to give this game a better Review because in theory it's a great game but because nothing really works it's just an annoyance.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your feedback, and I really appreciate you sharing your experience through your stream. I've seen it, and I can understand your frustration with the issues you've encountered in the game. We are actively working on fixes, and some of the problems you mentioned will be addressed in the upcoming update, such as the 5-minute movement issue, increased initial building limits (with new items unlocking further building capacity later in the game), and the resource scarcity.

You might also want to try the 'Easy Mode' to help with some of the resource issues. But, as you rightly pointed out, the game does need polishing, and we’re always focused on refining the details.

We’re committed to making the game smoother, and we really value your insights. Please let me know how to contact you for more suggestions, or feel free to join our Discord where I can be reached directly: http://discord.gg/KTjpGAFuGE. We'd love to hear more from you to improve the experience.

If you want a good survival game I’d recommend Green Hell.

developer_response.body:
Sorry, the way the earlier versions worked was terrible, it's our problem, sorry.
We have fixed a lot of operation methods and some optimizations in the latest version, if you are interested, you can try the latest version.
